retrieval.query_summary: Retrieve trading rules for SMC, SnD, risk management, and timeframe alignment.

factors.notes: H8 and H4 confirmed bearish CHoCH and BMS.

factors.notes: USD strength aligns with bearish Gold bias.

cot_signal.summary: Net speculative positioning is bullish on USD, bearish on Gold.

evidence.content_preview: SMC: SH+BMS+RTO · SMS+BMS+RTO · Turtle Soup · AMD cycle

raw_response.explainable_reasoning: The market is in a strong bearish trend across all major high timeframes (D1, H12, H8, H6, H4, H3). Price has retraced into the premium of the dealing range, mitigating the unmitigated H8 Bearish Order Block at 4533.93 - 4588.98. This zone is highly confluent, having swept the Previous Daily High (PDH) at 4588.98 and cleared inducement at 4570.82. Lower timeframe confirmation is already printing on M1 with a bearish CHoCH and BMS. We execute a limit order at the candidate entry price of 4561.455, placing our stop loss safely above the structural high at 4594.935. Our targets are structurally placed at key liquidity pools: TP1 at 4536.89 (H4 swing high), TP2 at 4511.95 (H1 swing low), and TP3 at 4453.61 (H4 major swing low), yielding an excellent risk-to-reward ratio of 3.22.

htf_bias.notes: HTF structure is strongly bearish with consecutive BMS events on D1 and H12.

evidence.content_preview: Metals (XAU/USD, XAG/USD) Inverse correlation. Bearish DXY = bullish Gold bias.

mtf_bias.notes: MTF structure is bearish with H8 and H4 confirming bearish CHoCH and BMS.

evidence.content_preview: SL must be structural — placed beyond the invalidation level of the setup

stop_loss.reason: Placed above the H8 swing high and order block invalidation level with a structural offset.

take_profits.basis: H4 structural swing high / minor support level.
H1 structural swing low / major liquidity pool.
H4 major swing low / key demand zone.
